info.name: Magento 2 Image Editor API
info.description: Postman Collection for Magento 2 Image Editor API including custom Project sizes and width/height dimensions.

graphql.query:
mutation CreateImageEditorProject($input: CreateImageEditorProjectInput!) {
  createImageEditorProject(input: $input) {
    id
    uuid
    customerId
    storeId
    name
    description
    size
    width
    height
    status
    productSku
    canvasObject
    thumbnailUrl
    createdAt
    updatedAt
  }
}

mutation UpdateImageEditorProject($input: UpdateImageEditorProjectInput!) {
  updateImageEditorProject(input: $input) {
    id
    uuid
    customerId
    storeId
    name
    description
    size
    width
    height
    status
    productSku
    canvasObject
    thumbnailUrl
    createdAt
    updatedAt
  }
}

mutation UpdateProjectThumbnail($input: UpdateImageEditorProjectThumbnailInput!) {
  updateImageEditorProjectThumbnail(input: $input) {
    id
    uuid
    customerId
    storeId
    name
    description
    size
    width
    height
    status
    canvasObject
    thumbnailUrl
    createdAt
    updatedAt
  }
}

query GetProjects($status: String, $pageSize: Int, $currentPage: Int) {
  imageEditorProjects(status: $status, pageSize: $pageSize, currentPage: $currentPage) {
    totalCount
    items {
      id
      uuid
      customerId
      storeId
      name
      description
      size
      width
      height
      status
      productSku
      canvasObject
      thumbnailUrl
      createdAt
      updatedAt
    }
    pageInfo {
      pageSize
      currentPage
      totalPages
      hasNextPage
      hasPreviousPage
    }
  }
}

query GetProjectByUuid($uuid: String!) {
  imageEditorProjectByUuid(uuid: $uuid) {
    id
    uuid
    customerId
    storeId
    name
    description
    size
    width
    height
    status
    productSku
    canvasObject
    thumbnailUrl
    createdAt
    updatedAt
  }
}

formdata.value:
{"query":"mutation CreateImageEditorProjectImage($input: CreateImageEditorProjectImageInput!) {
  createImageEditorProjectImage(input: $input) {
    id
    uuid
    projectId
    customerId
    storeId
    status
    fileName
    originalName
    filePath
    fileUrl
    thumbnailUrl
    mimeType
    extension
    sizeBytes
    width
    height
    description
    createdAt
    updatedAt
  }
}","variables":{"input":{"projectUuid":"INSERT_PROJECT_UUID_HERE","file":null}}}

{"query":"mutation CreateImageEditorDefaultImage($input: CreateImageEditorDefaultImageInput!) {
  createImageEditorDefaultImage(input: $input) {
    id
    uuid
    projectId
    customerId
    storeId
    status
    fileName
    originalName
    filePath
    fileUrl
    thumbnailUrl
    mimeType
    extension
    sizeBytes
    width
    height
    description
    createdAt
    updatedAt
  }
}","variables":{"input":{"description":"Lush forest scene with tall trees","file":null}}}

graphql.query:
query GetProjectImages($projectUuid: String!, $pageSize: Int, $currentPage: Int) {
  imageEditorProjectImages(projectUuid: $projectUuid, pageSize: $pageSize, currentPage: $currentPage) {
    totalCount
    items {
      id
      uuid
      projectId
      customerId
      storeId
      status
      fileName
      originalName
      filePath
      fileUrl
      thumbnailUrl
      mimeType
      extension
      sizeBytes
      width
      height
      description
      createdAt
      updatedAt
    }
    pageInfo {
      pageSize
      currentPage
      totalPages
      hasNextPage
      hasPreviousPage
    }
  }
}

query GetDefaultImages($search: String, $pageSize: Int, $currentPage: Int) {
  imageEditorDefaultImages(search: $search, pageSize: $pageSize, currentPage: $currentPage) {
    totalCount
    items {
      id
      uuid
      projectId
      customerId
      storeId
      status
      fileName
      originalName
      filePath
      fileUrl
      thumbnailUrl
      mimeType
      extension
      sizeBytes
      width
      height
      description
      createdAt
      updatedAt
    }
    pageInfo {
      pageSize
      currentPage
      totalPages
      hasNextPage
      hasPreviousPage
    }
  }
}
